mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET status = CASE WHEN status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 'CANCELLED' END WHERE status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'PENDING') AND ( reservation_date < #{today} OR ( reservation_date = #{today} AND end_time <= #{now} ) )
mapper.select: SELECT start_time AS startTime, COUNT(*) AS reservedCount FROM reservation WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId} AND reservation_date = #{reservationDate} AND status = 'CONFIRMED' GROUP BY start_time ORDER BY start_time

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.facility_id, f.name AS facilityName, r.reservation_date, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.seat_no, r.status, r.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation r2 WHERE r2.facility_id = r.facility_id AND r2.reservation_date = r.reservation_date AND r2.start_time = r.start_time AND r2.status = 'CONFIRMED') AS currentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation r2 WHERE r2.program_id = r.program_id AND r2.status = 'PENDING' AND r.program_id IS NOT NULL) AS pendingCount, gx.start_date, gx.end_date, gx.program_id, gx.days_of_week, u.name as userName, h.dong, h.ho, r.approved_at, r.cancelled_at, f.max_capacity FROM reservation r JOIN facility f ON f.facility_id = r.facility_id LEFT JOIN gx_program gx ON gx.program_id = r.program_id LEFT JOIN user u ON u.user_id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN household h ON u.household_id = h.household_id
WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId}

SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.user_id AS userId, r.facility_id AS facilityId, r.program_id AS programId,
r.reservation_date AS reservationDate, r.start_time AS startTime, r.end_time AS endTime, r.seat_no AS seatNo, r.status AS status, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.approved_at AS approvedAt, r.cancelled_at AS cancelledAt,
f.name AS facilityName, f.max_capacity AS maxCapacity,
ft.type_id AS typeId, ft.name AS typeName,
gx.start_date AS startDate, gx.end_date AS endDate, gx.days_of_week ,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation r2 WHERE r2.facility_id = r.facility_id AND r2.reservation_date = r.reservation_date AND r2.start_time = r.start_time AND r2.status = 'CONFIRMED') AS currentCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation r2 WHERE r2.program_id = r.program_id AND r2.status = 'PENDING' AND r.program_id IS NOT NULL) AS pendingCount
FROM reservation r JOIN facility f ON r.facility_id = f.facility_id JOIN facility_type ft ON f.type_id = ft.type_id LEFT JOIN gx_program gx ON r.program_id = gx.program_id
WHERE r.user_id = #{userId}
AND r.status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'PENDING')
AND r.status IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED')
AND f.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY r.reservation_date, r.start_time LIMIT #{startIdx}, #{size}
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET seat_no = NULL, status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{id}
UPDATE reservation SET seat_no = NULL, status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = NOW() WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId} AND status in('CONFIRMED','PENDING')
mapper.select: SELECT gx.program_id AS programId, gx.start_date AS startDate, gx.end_date AS endDate, gx.days_of_week AS daysOfWeek, gx.status, gx.created_at AS createdAt, f.facility_id AS facilityId, f.max_capacity AS maxCapacity FROM gx_program gx JOIN facility f ON gx.facility_id = f.facility_id WHERE gx.program_id = #{programId}

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.program_id, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.seat_no,r.status, r.created_at, f.facility_id, f.name as facilityName
FROM reservation r JOIN facility f ON r.facility_id = f.facility_id WHERE r.program_id = #{programId} AND r.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY r.created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET status = 'CONFIRMED', approved_at = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
UPDATE reservation SET status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
UPDATE gx_program SET status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE program_id = #{programId}
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) AS pendingCount FROM reservation WHERE status = 'PENDING'

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN reservation_date = CURDATE() THEN 1 END) AS todayTotal, COUNT(CASE WHEN reservation_date = CURDATE() AND NOW() BETWEEN start_time AND end_time AND status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 END) AS todayConfirmed, COUNT(CASE WHEN reservation_date = CURDATE() AND status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 END) AS todayCancelled, COUNT(CASE WHEN reservation_date = CURDATE() AND status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 END) AS todayPending, COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(reservation_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') THEN 1 END) AS monthTotal, COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM reservation

SELECT r.reservation_id, f.facility_id, f.name as facilityName, ft.type_id, ft.name as typeName, r.reservation_date, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.seat_no, r.status, u.name as userName, h.dong, h.ho, gx.program_id, f.max_capacity FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN facility f ON r.facility_id = f.facility_id LEFT JOIN facility_type ft ON f.type_id = ft.type_id LEFT JOIN gx_program gx ON r.program_id = gx.program_id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN household h ON u.household_id = h.household_id WHERE ft.type_id = #{typeId} AND r.reservation_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate};

SELECT f.facility_id, p.program_id, f.max_capacity, f.name AS facilityName, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.status = 'PENDING' THEN r.user_id END) AS pendingCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN r.user_id END) AS confirmedCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN r.user_id END) AS cancelledCount FROM gx_program p JOIN facility f ON p.facility_id = f.facility_id LEFT JOIN reservation r ON p.program_id = r.program_id AND r.reservation_date >= #{startDate} AND r.reservation_date <= #{endDate} WHERE f.type_id = #{typeId} AND p.start_date <= #{endDate} AND p.end_date >= #{startDate} GROUP BY p.program_id, f.facility_id, f.max_capacity
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE program_id = #{programId} AND status = 'CONFIRMED'

SELECT r.start_time AS startTime, r.end_time AS endTime, r.seat_no AS seatNo, u.name AS userName, h.dong, h.ho, r.status, f.facility_id AS facilityId, f.name AS facilityName, r.reservation_id AS reservationId, u.user_id AS userId FROM reservation r JOIN facility f ON r.facility_id = f.facility_id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN household h ON u.household_id = h.household_id WHERE f.type_id = #{typeId} AND r.reservation_date = #{startDate} ORDER BY f.facility_id, r.start_time, r.seat_no, r.created_at

SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, h.dong, h.ho, r.status, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM reservation r JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN household h ON u.household_id = h.household_id WHERE r.program_id = #{programId} AND r.reservation_date >= #{startDate} AND r.reservation_date <= #{endDate} ORDER BY r.created_at ASC

WITH today_count AS ( SELECT f.type_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM reservation r JOIN facility f ON r.facility_id = f.facility_id WHERE r.reservation_date = CURDATE() AND r.status = 'CONFIRMED' AND f.type_id IN (1, 2, 3) GROUP BY f.type_id )
SELECT MIN(f.facility_id) AS facilityId, MIN(ft.name) AS facilityName,
CONCAT( TIME_FORMAT(MIN(f.open_time), '%H:%i'), '~', TIME_FORMAT(MAX(f.close_time), '%H:%i'), ' · ', CASE ft.type_id WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT('좌석 ', SUM(f.max_capacity), '석') WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT('정원 ', 50, '명') WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT('타석 ', MAX(f.max_capacity), '개') END ) AS hours,
COALESCE(tc.cnt, 0) AS currentCount, ft.type_id AS typeId, CASE ft.type_id WHEN 1 THEN SUM(f.max_capacity) WHEN 2 THEN 50 WHEN 3 THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, MIN(f.open_time), MAX(f.close_time)) / MAX(f.slot_duration) * MAX(f.max_capacity) END AS totalCount,
CASE ft.type_id WHEN 1 THEN 'green' WHEN 2 THEN 'dark' WHEN 3 THEN 'yellow' END AS barColor,
CASE ft.type_id WHEN 2 THEN false ELSE COALESCE(tc.cnt, 0) >= CASE ft.type_id WHEN 1 THEN SUM(f.max_capacity) WHEN 3 THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, MIN(f.open_time), MAX(f.close_time)) / MAX(f.slot_duration) * MAX(f.max_capacity) END END AS isFull
FROM facility f JOIN facility_type ft ON f.type_id = ft.type_id LEFT JOIN today_count tc ON tc.type_id = ft.type_id WHERE ft.type_id IN (1, 2, 3) GROUP BY ft.type_id, tc.cnt ORDER BY ft.type_id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation r JOIN facility f ON r.facility_id = f.facility_id JOIN facility_type ft ON f.type_id = ft.type_id LEFT JOIN gx_program gx ON r.program_id = gx.program_id
WHERE r.user_id = #{userId}
AND r.status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'PENDING')
AND r.status IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED')
AND f.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
